---
title: "Causal evidence on income satiation points of happiness and well-being in Kenya"
subtitle: "Work in progress"
author: "with Johannes Haushofer"
description: "Causal evidence on whether the well-being returns to income level off in Kenya."
categories: ["Behavioral Economics", "Well-being", "Development"]
---

Causal evidence on whether, and at what point, the well-being returns to higher income level off in Kenya.
